LanguageData.Panaquatic_PanaquaticZone_description: Create a zone where colonists will try to grow aquatic plants. This zone can be placed over both fresh and salty water, unless changed in mod settings.
LanguageData.Panaquatic_MarineAgricultureLabel: Allows to place the zone over ocean tiles
LanguageData.Panaquatic_MarineAgricultureTooltip: On by default. You probably want this off if you aren't using Merren though.
LanguageData.Panaquatic_IndustrialRunoffTooLabel: Allows to place the zone over polluted tiles
LanguageData.Panaquatic_IndustrialRunoffTooTooltip: Off by default. Excluded for convenience: I'm yet to see a mod with cultivated plants which grow in polluted water. Perhaps I don't play enough mods. Report if you see something fun here, alright?
LanguageData.Panaquatic_WarnPreferenceMismatch: {0} will not be sown in the entire zone because of water preference mismatch
